description: John Zenon, an environmental site surveyor, was bitten on the right calf by a potentially rabid stray dog while in the field. As the occupational health and safety officer, initiate the Rabies Post-Exposure Prophylaxis (PEP) protocol in GNU Health: 1. Add an active condition for the animal bite (ICD-10: W54). 2. Add an active condition for Rabies exposure (ICD-10: Z20.3). 3. Prescribe Amoxicillin (or Amoxicillin-Clavulanate) for antibiotic prophylaxis. 4. Prescribe or record a vaccination for Tetanus. 5. Schedule exactly 3 separate future appointments for the multi-dose Rabies PEP vaccine series. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
